Conversation.description: Sends a chat message, optionally storing messages as you go.

Generate Audio.description: Generate audio from text using Gemini text-to-speech models. Useful for voice responses and audio prompts.

Generate Image.description: Generate an image from a text prompt using Gemini or Imagen models.

Generate Video.description: Generate a video from a text prompt using Veo models.

Send Prompt.description: Sends a prompt and generates a response.

Understand Audio.description: Generate a text response from an audio clip using Gemini models. Useful for summaries, transcripts, and questions about the audio.

Understand Document.description: Generate a text response from a document using Gemini models. Useful for summaries, key points, and questions about the document.

Understand Video.description: Generate a text response from a video using Gemini models. Useful for summaries, key events, and Q&A about the video.

Understand YouTube Video.description: Generate a text response from a YouTube video using Gemini models. Useful for summaries, key moments, and questions about the video.
